final:
// // This module implements an AND gate instead of an XOR gate
module top_module(
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB,
    output reg XOR_output
);always @(*) begin
        XOR_output = VPB ^ VNB;
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an AND gate instead of an XOR gate
